_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Merlin was highly concentrated in nuclei (DRAQ5-positive) of immature oligodendrocytes, which can be labeled for NG2-EYFP mice using GFP antibodies
details: Merlin was highly concentrated in nuclei of immature oligodendrocytes labeled with NG2-EYFP and also present in cytoplasm
